title: austrobuxus carunculatus
intro: Austrobuxus carunculatus, also known as the Australian box or rainforest box, is a small to medium-sized tree native to the rainforests of Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Austrobuxus carunculatus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to create remedies for a range of health conditions.
